name: jira-project-assistant
description: Atlassian Forge app for managing a Jira project: surfaces problematic issues and auto-fixes some of them.

scripts.tunnel: set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null || { echo 'Missing .env — copy .env.example and fill it in (forge needs credentials).'; exit 1; }; set +a; forge tunnel
scripts.deploy: set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null || { echo 'Missing .env — copy .env.example and fill it in (forge needs credentials).'; exit 1; }; set +a; npm --prefix frontend run build && forge deploy
scripts.test:jira: set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null || { echo 'Missing .env — the jira lane needs JIRA_APP_URL (+ a saved session or JIRA_LOGIN/JIRA_PASSWORD).'; exit 1; }; set +a; playwright install chromium && playwright test --project=jira

author: Рашид Шафеев <rashidshafeev@gmail.com>
